queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and its role as a credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: no credits taken or all previous credits paid back duly.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with borrowers having no prior credit history or exclusively fully repaid loans and their contribution to increased credit risk.
Empirical analysis of the relationship between loan duration in months and its contribution to elevated credit risk and default probability.
